summary_one_line: A well-formed scheme://host:port/path URL whose scheme parses to an FTP-family wildcard-capable handler that sets wildcard_enabled.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The leading bytes (offset 0x06 onward) must spell a recognizable URL scheme followed by '://127.0.0.1:9001/850' so curl parses a valid scheme and host:port, letting an FTP-family handler set data->set.wildcard_enabled (and thus data->state.wildcardmatch). The winner needs structured ASCII scheme/host literals, not random punctuation soup.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds carry intact scheme+authority literals: 'pop8://127' / 'MQTT://127' at offsets 0x06-0x18 and '.0.0.1:9001/850' continuing, with the byte-diff showing W concentrated on '/'(0x2f) at 0x0c, '127'/'.0.0.1' digits and ':' at 0x10-0x1b. This parses as a real URL, reaching the wildcard-enabled true branch.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds are degenerate runs of '%','.','-','+' punctuation (e.g. '%%%%!%e&%e$%dErF') with no scheme delimiter or host:port, so the URL parse never yields a wildcard-capable handler and wildcardmatch stays false (false branch taken 10/10).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile's CMP_MAP. I2S substitution copies the exact comparison operands (scheme/host literal bytes curl's parser checks) directly into the input at the right offsets, synthesizing the well-formed scheme://host:port/path string that the CMP_MAP Hamming-gradient alone (value_profile) could not assemble within budget.

evidence_trail.claim: The decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog beating value_profile with technique delta I2S.
The winner resolves 9/10 trials and the loser blocks 9/10, a strong divergence.
The blocked branch is the wildcardmatch test in Curl_pretransfer.
wildcardmatch is set from data->set.wildcard_enabled immediately before the blocker.
Winner-resolving seeds contain a well-formed scheme://host:port/path URL.
Another winner seed carries the MQTT scheme prefix with the same authority.
Loser-blocking seeds are degenerate punctuation runs with no scheme or host literal.
The byte diff shows W concentrated on a '/' delimiter at offset 0x0c while L is punctuation.
The byte diff shows W carries the host digits/colon while L is unstructured.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of the CMP_MAP gradient.
value_profile (the loser) has no I2SRandReplace mutator.
The blocker true branch is taken only by the winner role and never by the loser role.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 468 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 5fec9094ba291fe6` and observed an I2S-floor row (mutation_op = -) at depth 4 of the ancestor chain (1 dash row reported), the dash-floor signal exclusive to cmplog/vpc under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where the wildcard-enabling URL scheme/host literal is reachable by gradient alone shows value_profile resolving the wildcardmatch branch as often as value_profile_cmplog (no I2S advantage), refuting that I2S substitution of the scheme literal is the divergence driver.

weakest_evidence_point: The causal link from the parsed scheme literal to data->set.wildcard_enabled is inferred from the assignment at L1498 plus seed structure; the prompt does not expose the URL-parser code path that actually sets wildcard_enabled.
